repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): skip auth gate for CLI-owned transport
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

Finalize #88551 from @yu-xin-c. Configured CLI-owned runtimes such as `anthropic/*` with `agentRuntime.id: "claude-cli"` should not be blocked by stale OpenClaw provider auth cooldown state before the CLI transport starts, and CLI-owned attempts should avoid auto-filling `authProfileId` when auth-profile forwarding is disabled.

## Repair Plan

- Keep the narrow contributor patch on #88551 when possible.
- Refresh/rebase the contributor branch only as needed.
- Address any fresh Codex /review findings.
- Preserve the focused coverage for stale provider cooldown bypass and unset CLI `authProfileId`.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88551
Credit: thanks @yu-xin-c for the original fix and regression coverage.
credit_notes: Preserve @yu-xin-c as the source PR author for #88551.
If the executor must create a replacement unexpectedly, the replacement PR body must credit @yu-xin-c and link https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88551.
CHANGELOG.md is release-generated; put user-facing release-note context in the PR body or squash message instead.
